title: Fully Combined Parcel Review and Executive Summary Workflow

top_nav_simplification.backwards_compatibility: The internal executive_print mode remains supported through AppShell compatibility redirect into Parcel Review > Executive Summary, but it is no longer shown as a separate top-level nav button.

empty_state_redesign.title: Select a parcel to begin review
empty_state_redesign.message: Use the top search bar or click a live map marker. After selection, CFS will show parcel facts, zoning, development activity, flood context, school assignment, transportation context, utility proxy context, and executive summary options.

selected_parcel_workflow.subtext: Review selected parcel context, constraints, activity, and generate a printable executive summary.

review_tab.purpose: Working parcel review and due diligence evidence.
cleanup: Development and new construction content stays combined in one section.
Flood, school, transportation, and utility proxy content stays grouped under Constraints & Services.
No disabled report controls are shown inside the Review content.

executive_summary_integration.purpose: Report preview generated from the selected parcel review context.
executive_summary_integration.component_reuse: ExecutivePrintView remains reused as the report body.
executive_summary_integration.subtext: This summary is generated from the selected parcel review context and formatted for stakeholder discussion or printing.

print_behavior.print_button: Print Report is an action in the Parcel Review command header and workflow action bar.
print_behavior.selected_parcel_behavior: Switches to Executive Summary and calls window.print().
print_behavior.report_preview_button: Print Executive Summary remains visible in the Executive Summary preview.
print_behavior.print_css: Existing print CSS continues to hide app chrome, navigation, sidebars, and interactive controls.

documentation_updates.summary: Replaced the Due Diligence / Executive Report product-mode split with Overview, Parcel Review, and Methodology.
Updated demo flow to open Parcel Review, then Executive Summary inside Parcel Review.
Removed instructions to open a separate Executive Report top-nav mode.
Updated spoken demo language to describe Parcel Review and its internal Executive Summary.

safety_verification.source_grep_note: Prediction-related names remain only in internal research/diagnostic hooks; they are not exposed in the Parcel Review UI.

smoke_test_results.parcel_search: passed using top search with keypress input
known_warnings: ArcGIS draped graphics label-placement warnings remain.
smoke_test_results.browser_note: The Browser plugin virtual clipboard is unavailable, so top search was automated with keypress events. Case-insensitive checks were used for uppercase-rendered labels.

remaining_known_issues: Known ArcGIS label-placement warnings continue and are unrelated to Parcel Review consolidation.
The legacy ExecutivePrintView component name remains in code for compatibility, but the visible workflow is Parcel Review > Executive Summary.
